description: HTML source code for a web-based database viewer interface including embedded CSS and JavaScript for dynamic data loading, UI interactions, and rendering database content.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches and displays list of databases from server API.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list, resets UI states, and shows loading indicator.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database to show its tables and loads table list if necessary.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays list of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data from a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Creates HTML table for displaying data with horizontal scrolling if needed.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cell content with handling for nulls, objects, and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full data.
